title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Bosch India Software Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Bosch India Software Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Bosch India Software Digital Technologies in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Bosch India Software Digital Technologies:
Bosch India Software Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software Digital Technologies!
